name: token fidelity — bar build token list matches step spec verbatim
task_prompt: Run step 1 of the parallel-eval sequence to enumerate evaluation frames for choosing between two database indexing strategies: (1) B-tree index, (2) hash index. Read `bar sequence show parallel-eval` first. The step specification names exact tokens — use them verbatim in your bar build command. Do not substitute similar tokens.
eval_gate: The bar build invocation at step 1 must contain 'prism' as a method token. Any other method token (show, sweep, shift, sense, etc.) is a Criterion B failure.
notes: Tests Criterion B: agent must use the exact tokens from the step spec. The parallel-eval step 1 spec is 'bar build make method:prism'. Expected violation: agent runs 'bar build make method:sweep' or 'bar build make method:shift' — plausible substitutions from memory. Pass: token list contains 'prism' and no other method token.
